response_quality.message_zh: 检测到大量相同答案，疑似直线作答或敷衍，建议重新认真测评。
response_quality.message_en: Many identical answers detected (possible straight-lining or rushing). Please retake carefully.

response_quality.message_zh: 答案明显偏向 A 侧或 B 侧，可能存在理解偏差或敷衍。
response_quality.message_en: Responses are strongly biased toward one side; possible misunderstanding or rushing.

data_quality_notes: 你的 Holland 得分区分度较低（各类型分数接近），三码可能不能清晰代表你的兴趣偏好，建议结合日常经历进一步验证。/ Your Holland scores show low differentiation (types are close together), so the three-letter code may not clearly represent your interests. Validate against your daily experiences.
